prompt: Combine and merge image 2 into image 1. Left side to be image 1 and then it blends to combine image 2 on right side.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, an artwork depicting a red tree on a cliff, by seamlessly merging elements from image 2, a colorful landscape with a house and river. The resulting image should feature the red tree scene from image 1 on the left side, transitioning smoothly into the landscape scene from image 2 on the right side.
objects: red tree on a cliff (on the left)
